dict.string: Parallax Capture records system or microphone audio only when you start a screen recording.
Parallax Capture saves screenshots and recordings only to folders you choose.
Parallax Capture can open or save media from Downloads when you choose that folder.
Parallax Capture can open or save media from Desktop when you choose that folder.
Parallax Capture opens images and videos selected by the user for annotation or trimming.
Parallax Capture writes screenshots, recordings, frames, GIFs, and trims to user-selected locations.
macOS requires Screen Recording permission for screenshots and video capture. The app surfaces recovery instructions when permission is missing.
Accessibility permission may be needed for global shortcut fallback behavior. Capture still reports a visible degraded state if unavailable.
Input Monitoring may be needed for global shortcut fallback behavior. The app must not silently pretend global shortcuts are active when unavailable.
Parallax Capture uses per-user app data and user-selected media folders, not administrator-owned locations.
